create.title: Create
title_loop: Ready to create your music video?
准备好创建你的音乐视频了吗？
create.description: Upload a song, name the project, and start a lyric video direction pass.
create.drop_description: Click or drag an audio file here
create.formats: MP3 / WAV / FLAC / AAC / OGG / M4A

lyric_videos.title: Creations
lyric_videos.description: Manage every lyric video project, draft, preview, and export in one place.
lyric_videos.raw_lyrics_placeholder: Paste lyrics here. The MVP transcription adapter will turn each line into timed lyrics.
lyric_videos.empty_description: Start from the Create page, upload a song, and the project will appear here after generation begins.
lyric_videos.delete_description: This removes "{title}" from your Creations list. The project data is soft-deleted and can be retained for recovery or audit.

start_creating.title: Start creating
start_creating.detail: Open the project to continue setup.

lyrics_failed.title: Needs attention
lyrics_failed.detail: Lyrics failed. Open the project to retry.

scenes_failed.title: Needs attention
scenes_failed.detail: Scenes failed. Open the project to retry.

export_failed.title: Needs attention
export_failed.detail: Export failed. Open the project to retry.

video_ready.title: Video ready
video_ready.detail: Open to preview or download the export.

ready_to_export.title: Ready to export
ready_to_export.detail: Scenes are ready for preview and MP4 export.

review_scene_draft.title: Review scene draft
review_scene_draft.detail: Open the project to review scenes before export.

creating_scenes.title: Creating scenes
creating_scenes.detail: Storyboards and visuals are being prepared.

lyrics_ready.title: Lyrics ready
lyrics_ready.detail: Open the project to create or review scenes.

transcribing_lyrics.title: Transcribing lyrics
transcribing_lyrics.detail: Audio is being processed into timed lyrics.

lyric_videos.story_prompt_placeholder: A cinematic story about longing, stage lights, and a final chorus.
lyric_videos.no_project_selected: Select a project to edit lyrics, scenes, preview, and export.

workbench.direction_started: Direction generation started. Review it when the editor unlocks.
workbench.lyrics_before_story: Generate lyrics before creating a story
workbench.story_locked: Language and Story are locked after scenes have been created.
workbench.scene_images_running: Scene image generation is already running
workbench.need_one_character: Each project needs at least one active character.
workbench.max_four_characters: This version supports up to four active characters.
workbench.no_audio: No audio available for this project

roadmap.lyrics_how: Upload audio and the lyrics and timing are detected automatically.
roadmap.story_how: Review the Story panel on the right, then click Confirm & Generate Scenes.
roadmap.scenes_how: Split the lyrics into scenes based on the story — generate them in the Scenes panel.
roadmap.images_wait_how: No need to wait — adjust cast or fonts meanwhile; images appear automatically when ready.
roadmap.images_retry_how: Retry the failed batches in the Scenes panel; successful images are kept.
roadmap.images_how: Open the Scenes panel and click Batch Generation to create an image for each scene.
roadmap.export_how: All visuals are ready — render and download the video.
roadmap.export_how_busy: Rendering in progress; download from the top right when it's done.
roadmap.done_how: Your video is ready — play it in the preview, or download from the top right.
roadmap.lyrics_done_how: Lyrics and timing are detected; view or edit them in the Lyrics panel.
roadmap.story_done_how: Re-edit the story anytime in the Customize panel.
roadmap.scenes_done_how: Adjust the content of each scene in the Scenes panel.
roadmap.images_done_how: Replace or regenerate any image in the Scenes panel.
roadmap.export_done_how: Download the exported video from the top right.
